finding.summary: Stereo image is wide (side 14 dB above mid, correlation -0.25) consistent with the track name 'Wide Synth' and the chorus FX; headroom (-5.5 dBTP), dynamics (12 dB crest factor, 8 LU LRA), and spectrum (gentle 6 dB/oct rolloff above 100 Hz) are healthy. No clear problem detected.
finding.probable_cause: Wide content aligns with the chorus plugin's intended widening on a synth track; correlation -0.25 sits above the typical -0.3 mono-compatibility concern threshold, and dynamics/loudness statistics indicate no over-compression or clipping.
finding.confidence_reason: Capture isolation verified, silence_fraction 0.05 makes the level statistics reliable, and the observations match the track name and FX chain intent.

evidence_refs.description: Correlation -0.25; wide but above the -0.3 mono-compatibility warning threshold.
Side RMS -14 dB, 14 dB above mid — side-dominant image.
8 LU — moderate dynamic range, not crushed.

proposal.reason: No clear problem is supported by this capture, so no safe move is proposed. A chorus parameter change is not safe because chorus parameter values are not reported in the payload.
